Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alison V. Lippa, Esq. of McGuireWoods, (310-315-8200), for all defendants and moving parties.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA N.A. and COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC.S' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 10-day leave to amend to address all issues raised in demurrer. Late-filed opposition and late-filed reply are stricken. Judge Lilian Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Continued To Mar-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA N.A. and COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS, RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to March 7, 2014 at 9:30 AM, because no courtesy copy of opposition to demurrer provided. Abrigo must provide courtesy copy of opposition by Tuesday, February 25, 2014.
Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
